colors.name: Shinshu

colors.description: The brownish-green color of the Japanese bush warbler.

colors.description: A pale blue-green traditionally used in textile dyeing.

colors.name: Kuri-iro
colors.description: A warm, earthy chestnut brown.

colors.description: A white pigment made from pulverized sea shells.

colors.name: Botan
colors.description: A vibrant, saturated pink inspired by the peony flower.

colors.name: Aitake
colors.description: The dark, shadowed green of an old bamboo grove.

colors.name: Sora-iro
